steps.command: STATE=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' nextra-s3server 2>/dev/null); if [ "$STATE" = "true" ]; then echo '[s3] Already running'; exit 0; fi; docker rm -f nextra-s3server 2>/dev/null || true; docker network create nextra-s3server-net 2>/dev/null || true; docker volume create nextra-s3server-data; DB_STATE=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' nextra-s3server-db 2>/dev/null); if [ "$DB_STATE" != "true" ]; then docker rm -f nextra-s3server-db 2>/dev/null || true; docker volume create nextra-s3server-dbdata; docker run -d --name nextra-s3server-db --network nextra-s3server-net --mount type=volume,src=nextra-s3server-dbdata,dst=/var/lib/postgresql/data -e POSTGRES_DB=s3server -e POSTGRES_USER=s3user -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=s3pass postgres:16-alpine; fi; docker run -d --name nextra-s3server --network nextra-s3server-net -p 9000:9000 --mount type=volume,src=nextra-s3server-data,dst=/data/s3 -e 'S3_DB_CONN=host=nextra-s3server-db port=5432 dbname=s3server user=s3user password=s3pass' -e S3_DATA_DIR=/data/s3 -e S3_REGION=us-east-1 -e S3_PORT=9000 -e PGHOST=nextra-s3server-db -e PGPORT=5432 -e PGUSER=s3user -e PGPASSWORD=s3pass -e PGDATABASE=s3server nextra-s3server; echo '[s3] Started on port 9000'
